judgeReasoning: The response covers all three required points: it explains group organizes navigation, llms.txt sections, and AGENTS.md grouping; it characterizes /llms-full.txt as the monolithic all-docs fallback that is not split by group; and it names multiple valid optional fields (icon, deprecated, experimental, canary, new, draft, tags, full, lastModified, lastAuthor). However, it introduces some likely-invented fields (deprecatedReason, availableIn) and claims per-group llms-full bundles exist by default, which contradicts the rubric note that site mode no longer emits per-group full-context files by default. Still, the core required claims are correctly stated.
